text: How do you feel about proprietary software?

options.text: 🤷 I don't care — whatever works best
⚖️ I prefer open source but use proprietary when needed
🛡️ I strongly prefer FOSS and avoid proprietary
🕊️ I want zero proprietary software — freedom only
🚫 I specifically want to avoid systemd
🧘 Flexible — I just lean toward open source
🔍 I'd choose the open-source option when reasonably possible

text: How actively do you promote FOSS?

options.text: 🌍 I try to use FOSS but accept reality
📢 I advocate for FOSS and contribute to it
